Who We Are

Built on Quality, Rooted in Bakersfield

S P Flooring started with a simple mission: to provide Bakersfield with durable, beautiful flooring solutions, installed with integrity. We're a locally-owned business, and we understand the specific challenges our climate and community present.

We believe in transparent communication, meticulous craftsmanship, and exceeding expectations. Our team treats every project, big or small, with the same dedication to quality and attention to detail. We stand behind our work, ensuring lasting satisfaction.

Bakersfield is our home, and we're committed to giving back. We actively participate in local initiatives and support community organizations. We believe that strong homes build a stronger Bakersfield.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Our Difference

Why Choose S P Flooring

Expert Installation

Precision and care in every installation, ensuring lasting quality and beauty.

Wide Selection

From hardwood to tile, we offer a diverse range of flooring options to suit any style and budget.

Local Expertise

We understand Bakersfield's climate and housing styles, providing tailored solutions.

Guaranteed Satisfaction

We stand behind our work and guarantee your complete satisfaction with our services.

Transform Your Space Today

Get a free quote and discover the perfect flooring solution for your Bakersfield home or business.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

S P Flooring did an amazing job installing hardwood floors in my living room! The team was professional and efficient, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. They even helped me choose the perfect stain to match my furniture. Highly recommend!

Maria G. Hardwood Flooring
“

I hired S P Flooring to install tile in my bathroom, and I'm very happy with the results. The installation was clean and precise, and the tile looks great. There were a couple of minor delays, but they communicated well and made sure everything was perfect in the end.

David K. Tile Flooring
“

S P Flooring installed laminate flooring in my entire house, and it looks fantastic! The price was very reasonable, and the installation was quick and efficient. The team was friendly and professional, and they cleaned up everything perfectly. I would definitely use them again!

Jessica L. Laminate Flooring
“

We had S P Flooring install vinyl plank in our kitchen and couldn't be happier. With the kids and dogs, we needed something waterproof and durable. It looks great and is so easy to clean. The installers were on time, professional, and did a fantastic job. Thanks!

Robert B. Vinyl Flooring
“

S P Flooring helped us pick out and install new carpet in the bedrooms. They were knowledgeable about the different options and helped us find something that fit our budget and style. The installation crew was efficient and careful. There was a small snag with the seams, but they came back promptly to fix it. Overall, a good experience.

Sarah M. Carpet Installation
“

After a pipe burst, we had significant water damage to our hardwood floors. S P Flooring came to the rescue! They were able to repair and refinish the damaged areas, and you can't even tell there was ever a problem. Their expertise saved us from having to replace the entire floor. Highly recommended for floor repair!

Tom H. Floor Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of hardwood is best for Bakersfield's climate?
Engineered hardwood is often a better choice in Bakersfield due to its increased stability in fluctuating humidity levels. We can also recommend specific wood species and sealants that resist drying and cracking.
How long does hardwood installation take?
The duration depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the installation. However, most residential hardwood projects are completed within 3-5 days.
Can you refinish existing hardwood floors?
Yes, we offer dustless sanding and refinishing services to revitalize your existing hardwood floors, restoring their original beauty and shine.
